title: FNAF Ultimate Custom Plushies
description: Add plushies from FNAF for decoration! Updated for 1.21.5!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb18e8d05bcc9b18cda013f1a32eb545e313b599.png)

This is an update of ShadowsCrow's FNAF Plushie resource pack for 1.21.5 NO MODS REQUIRED! :D

To my knowledge there's no way to add the emmisive textures at the minute but if I learn how to do this or someone lets me know I will update this resource pack

[ORIGINAL HERE FOR OLDER VERSIONS](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fnaf-ultimate-custom-plushie)

With this pack you can have a lot of plushies form the Five Night's at Freddy's saga!

Put them in a item frame for place it!

We currently have 121 Plushies in the pack.

To obtain the plushies you just need to rename a carved pumpkin with one of the next names:

Fnaf 1 Plushies:

-Freddy Plush -Bonnie Plush -Chica Plush -Foxy Plush -Mr Cupcake Plush -Golden Freddy Plush -Phone Guy Plush

Fnaf 2 Plushies:

-Toy Freddy Plush -Toy Bonnie Plush -Toy Chica Plush -Toy Foxy Plush -Mangle Plush -Balloon Boy Plush -JJ Plush -Puppet Plush -Withered Freddy Plush -Withered Bonnie Plush -Withered Chica Plush -Withered Foxy Plush -Withered Golden Freddy Plush -Shadow Freddy Plush -Shadow Bonnie Plush

Fnaf 3 Plushies:

-Phantom Freddy Plush -Phantom Chica Plush -Phantom Foxy Plush -Phantom Bb Plush -Phantom Mangle Plush -Phantom Puppet Plush -Springtrap Plush

Fnaf 4 Plushies:

-Psychic Friend Fredbear -Nightmare Freddy Plush -Nightmare Bonnie Plush -Nightmare Chica Plush -Nightmare Foxy Plush -Plushtrap -Nightmare Bb Plush -Nightmare Mangle Plush -Nightmarionette Plush -Nightmare Fredbear Plush -Nightmare Plush -Freddle B-Head Plush -Freddle B-Body Plush -Freddle B-Arm Plush -Freddy Bully Plush -Bonnie Bully Plush -Chica Bully Plush -Foxy Bully Plush -Crying Child Plush -Fredbear Plush -Springbonnie Plush -Jack-o-Bonnie Plush -Jack-o-Chica Plush -Grimm Foxy Plush

Fnaf SL plushies:

-Circus Baby Plush -Ballora Plush -Funtime Freddy Plush -Funtime Foxy Plush -Bidybab Plush -Electrobab Plush -Minireena Plush -Bon Bon Plush -Bonnet Plush -Ennard Plush -Lolbit Plush -Michael Plush -Elizabeth Plush

Fnaf PS Plushies:

-Rockstar Freddy Plush -Rockstar Bonnie Plush -Rockstar Chica Plush -Rockstar Foxy Plush -Lefty Plush -Security Puppet Plush -Mr Hippo Plush -Orville Plush -Happy Frog Plush -Pigpatch Plush -Nedd Bear Plush -El Chip Plush -Funtime Chica Plush -Music Man Plush -Helpy Plush -Bucket Bob Plush -Mr Can-do Plush -Mr Hugs Plush -No 1 Crate Plush -Pan Stan Plush -Candy Cadet Plush -Molten Freddy Plush -Scrap Baby Plush -Scraptrap Plush

Fnaf SB Plushies:

-Glamrock Freddy Plush -Glamrock Chica Plush -Roxanne Plush -Monty Plush -Moondrop Plush -Sundrop Plush -Dj Music Man Plush -Lil Music Man Plush -Map Bot Plush -Gregory Plush -The Blop Plush -Burntrap Plush

Fnaf Novels Plushies:

-Fetch Plush

Fnaf Other Plushies:

-Scott Cawthon Plush -Purple Guy Plush -Glitchtrap Plush -Vanessa Plush -Vanny Plush -Crying Soul Plush -Dreadbear Plush -Chipper Plush -Dee Dee Plush -Xor Plush

PlushBabies:

-Red Baby Plush -Red Scrap Plush -Stitch Baby Plush -Stitch Scrap Plush -Blind Baby Plush -Blind Scrap Plush

Have a nice day!
